channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-18410] interop: sanity-flr test_200b: ASSERTION( ioret == -ENOSPC ) failed
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for jianyu <yujian@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/a1080d31-c72a-4656-997e-5eb68a31356e

test_200b failed with the following error:

onyx-58vm4 crashed during sanity-flr test_200b

Test session details:
clients: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-master/4588 - 5.14.0-427.31.1.el9_4.x86_64
servers: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-b2_15/94 - 4.18.0-553.5.1.el8_lustre.x86_64

Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: == sanity-flr test 200b: racing IO, mirror extend and resync ========================================================== 10:43:40 (1730025820)
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: mkdir -p /mnt/lustre2
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: mount -t lustre -o user_xattr,flock 10.240.25.0@tcp:/lustre /mnt/lustre2
Lustre: Mounted lustre-client
Lustre: Skipped 1 previous similar message
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: mkdir -p /mnt/lustre3
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: mount -t lustre -o user_xattr,flock 10.240.25.0@tcp:/lustre /mnt/lustre3
Autotest: Test running for 420 minutes (lustre-master_full-part-1_4588.127)
Lustre: *** cfs_fail_loc=1423, val=0***
LustreError: 314786:0:(vvp_page.c:121:vvp_vmpage_error()) ASSERTION( ioret == -ENOSPC ) failed: (efault):[0x200049fb2:0x1429:0x0] got a stale page ffffdc7280bcd880: rc = -116.
LustreError: 314786:0:(vvp_page.c:121:vvp_vmpage_error()) LBUG
CPU: 1 PID: 314786 Comm: ptlrpcd_00_00 Kdump: loaded Tainted: G           OE     -------  ---  5.14.0-427.31.1.el9_4.x86_64 #1
Hardware name: Red Hat KVM, BIOS 0.5.1 01/01/2011
Call Trace:
 <TASK>
 dump_stack_lvl+0x34/0x48
 lbug_with_loc.cold+0x5/0x58 [libcfs]
 vvp_vmpage_error+0x267/0x270 [lustre]
 vvp_page_completion_write+0x238/0x3a0 [lustre]
 cl_page_completion+0x284/0x460 [obdclass]
 osc_completion+0x1de/0x2a0 [osc]
 ? _raw_spin_unlock+0xa/0x30
 osc_ap_completion.constprop.0+0x53/0x190 [osc]
 osc_extent_finish+0x396/0xae0 [osc]
 brw_interpret+0x1f1/0xa20 [osc]
 ptlrpc_check_set+0x3dc/0x1f30 [ptlrpc]
 ptlrpcd_check+0x431/0x5c0 [ptlrpc]
 ptlrpcd+0x20d/0x4a0 [ptlrpc]
 ? __pfx_woken_wake_function+0x10/0x10
 ? __pfx_ptlrpcd+0x10/0x10 [ptlrpc]
 kthread+0xe0/0x100
 ? __pfx_kthread+0x10/0x10
 ret_from_fork+0x2c/0x50
 </TASK>
LustreError: 314787:0:(vvp_page.c:121:vvp_vmpage_error()) ASSERTION( ioret == -ENOSPC ) failed: (efault):[0x200049fb2:0x1429:0x0] got a stale page ffffdc728024eb40: rc = -116.
LustreError: 314787:0:(vvp_page.c:121:vvp_vmpage_error()) LBUG
CPU: 0 PID: 314787 Comm: ptlrpcd_00_01 Kdump: loaded Tainted: G           OE     -------  ---  5.14.0-427.31.1.el9_4.x86_64 #1
Hardware name: Red Hat KVM, BIOS 0.5.1 01/01/2011
Call Trace:
 <TASK>
 dump_stack_lvl+0x34/0x48
 lbug_with_loc.cold+0x5/0x58 [libcfs]
 vvp_vmpage_error+0x267/0x270 [lustre]
 vvp_page_completion_write+0x238/0x3a0 [lustre]
 cl_page_completion+0x284/0x460 [obdclass]
 osc_completion+0x1de/0x2a0 [osc]
 ? _raw_spin_unlock+0xa/0x30
 osc_ap_completion.constprop.0+0x53/0x190 [osc]
 osc_extent_finish+0x396/0xae0 [osc]
 brw_interpret+0x1f1/0xa20 [osc]
 ptlrpc_check_set+0x3dc/0x1f30 [ptlrpc]
 ptlrpcd_check+0x431/0x5c0 [ptlrpc]
 ptlrpcd+0x20d/0x4a0 [ptlrpc]
 ? __pfx_woken_wake_function+0x10/0x10
 ? __pfx_ptlrpcd+0x10/0x10 [ptlrpc]
 kthread+0xe0/0x100
 ? __pfx_kthread+0x10/0x10
 ret_from_fork+0x2c/0x50
 </TASK>
Kernel panic - not syncing: LBUG
CPU: 0 PID: 314786 Comm: ptlrpcd_00_00 Kdump: loaded Tainted: G           OE     -------  ---  5.14.0-427.31.1.el9_4.x86_64 #1
Hardware name: Red Hat KVM, BIOS 0.5.1 01/01/2011
Call Trace:
 <TASK>
 dump_stack_lvl+0x34/0x48
 panic+0x107/0x2f7
 lbug_with_loc.cold+0x2f/0x58 [libcfs]
 vvp_vmpage_error+0x267/0x270 [lustre]
 vvp_page_completion_write+0x238/0x3a0 [lustre]
 cl_page_completion+0x284/0x460 [obdclass]
 osc_completion+0x1de/0x2a0 [osc]
 ? _raw_spin_unlock+0xa/0x30
 osc_ap_completion.constprop.0+0x53/0x190 [osc]
 osc_extent_finish+0x396/0xae0 [osc]
 brw_interpret+0x1f1/0xa20 [osc]
 ptlrpc_check_set+0x3dc/0x1f30 [ptlrpc]
 ptlrpcd_check+0x431/0x5c0 [ptlrpc]
 ptlrpcd+0x20d/0x4a0 [ptlrpc]
 ? __pfx_woken_wake_function+0x10/0x10
 ? __pfx_ptlrpcd+0x10/0x10 [ptlrpc]
 kthread+0xe0/0x100
 ? __pfx_kthread+0x10/0x10
 ret_from_fork+0x2c/0x50
 </TASK>

VVVVVVV DO NOT REMOVE LINES BELOW, Added by Maloo for auto-association VVVVVVV
sanity-flr test_200b - onyx-58vm4 crashed during sanity-flr test_200b
item.summary: interop: sanity-flr test_200b: ASSERTION( ioret == -ENOSPC ) failed

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.

comments.comment:
It looks like this is the same failure as LU-17070 was hitting in test_200c, but with the new LASSERT() instead of LBUG() added in patch https://review.whamcloud.com/55061 "LU-17070 lov: retry layout refresh if got old layouts" and running interop testing with 2.15.5 servers.

Should this subtest be skipped in interop mode with an old MDS? I see test_200c is skipped for MDS < 2.15.53, but it doesn't include the full "git describe" hash so it is hard to know what actual MDS-side fix is needed, since the 55061 patch is only changing the client. There is no version check in test_200b.

The failure occurred 9 times in interop test sessions in the past 6 months.
And it occurred 2 times in all of the Lustre 2.16.0 RC test sessions.
